x-scriptComments.dev: Start the API and frontend dev servers together from the repo root.
x-scriptComments.dev:api: Run the Bun API in watch/dev mode from the api workspace.
x-scriptComments.dev:frontend: Run the frontend dev server and point it at the local API URL, defaulting to http://localhost:3011.
x-scriptComments.dev:frontend:android: Run the Android-friendly frontend dev server on 0.0.0.0:3000 so an emulator or device can connect.
x-scriptComments.android:dev: Start the API, start the Android-friendly frontend server, wait for the frontend to come up, then launch the live-reload Android app on the resolved Android target.
x-scriptComments.hooks:install: Install the repo-local git hooks and enable submodule push protection.
x-scriptComments.build: Build both the frontend and API production outputs.
x-scriptComments.typecheck: Run TypeScript type checking for the frontend and API.
x-scriptComments.docker:build: Build the Docker images defined in docker-compose.yml.
x-scriptComments.docker:up: Start the Docker Compose stack in detached mode.
x-scriptComments.docker:down: Stop and remove the Docker Compose stack.

x-devDependencyComments.concurrently: Runs multiple long-lived commands in one terminal session.
x-devDependencyComments.wait-on: Waits for the frontend URL to be reachable before launching the Android app.

scripts.dev: concurrently -n api,frontend -c blue,green "npm run dev:api" "npm run dev:frontend"
scripts.android:dev: concurrently -n api,frontend,android -c blue,green,magenta "npm run dev:api" "npm run dev:frontend:android" "npx wait-on http://127.0.0.1:3000 && cd frontend && npm run android:dev"
scripts.hooks:install: git config --local core.hooksPath .githooks && git config --local push.recurseSubmodules check && chmod +x .githooks/pre-push
scripts.build: npm run build:frontend && npm run build:api
scripts.typecheck: cd frontend && npx tsc --noEmit && cd ../api && bun run typecheck
